2605.24503.title: FoodMonitor: Benchmarking MLLMs for Explainable Compliance Analysis
2605.24503.paper_summary: As AI-powered compliance monitoring becomes increasingly important in public governance and industrial safety, the ability to provide verifiable evidence and traceable accountability signals is essential. However, existing video anomaly detection datasets focus on event-level binary classification, lacking the rule-driven, explainable analysis required for real-world compliance scenarios. We introduce FoodMonitor, a benchmark for explainable compliance analysis in commercial kitchen surveillance. FoodMonitor comprises 477 video clips with 3,307 violation annotations across a dual-channel design covering both person-level and environment-level violations. Each annotation specifies which rule was violated, what non-compliant behavior occurred, and who committed it with frame-level bounding boxes. We establish a unified evaluation protocol with a two-stage matching mechanism that separately assesses spatial localization and semantic understanding, along with a composite metric ($C_{\text{score}}$) that balances environment and person detection performance. Systematic evaluation of several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models reveals that the best-performing model achieves only 0.360 $C_{\text{score}}$, with spatial localization and fine-grained rule understanding emerging as the primary bottlenecks. Our analysis identifies two distinct failure modes: localization-dominated errors and semantics-dominated errors, providing diagnostic insights for future model development.
2605.24503.paper_summary_zh: 隨著人工智慧驅動的合規監控在公共治理和工業安全中變得越來越重要，提供可驗證的證據和可追溯的問責信號的能力變得至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的視頻異常檢測數據集專注於事件級別的二元分類，缺乏實際合規場景所需的基於規則的可解釋分析。<lb/>我們介紹了 FoodMonitor，這是一個針對商業廚房監控的可解釋合規分析基準。<lb/>FoodMonitor 包含 477 個視頻片段，並在雙通道設計中提供 3,307 個違規註釋，涵蓋了個人級和環境級的違規行為。<lb/>每個註釋都指定了違反了哪條規則、發生了什麼不合規行為以及誰進行了該行為，並附有幀級邊界框。<lb/>我們建立了一個統一的評估協議，採用兩階段匹配機制，分別評估空間定位和語義理解，並提供一個綜合指標 ($C_{\text{score}}$)，以平衡環境和個人檢測性能。<lb/>對幾個最先進的多模態大型語言模型的系統評估顯示，表現最佳的模型僅達到 0.360 的 $C_{\text{score}}$，而空間定位和細粒度規則理解成為主要瓶頸。<lb/>我們的分析識別了兩種不同的失敗模式：以定位為主的錯誤和以語義為主的錯誤，為未來的模型開發提供了診斷見解。
2605.24503.author: Ruihao Xu et.al.
2605.24503.authors: Ruihao Xu, Xingming Shui, Jingxuan Niu, Yiqin Wang, Jilin Yu, Haoji Zhang, Yansong Tang
